hero.title: Finance & compliance, <1>made simple</1> for temples and trusts.
hero.subtitle: TrustSaathi helps temples, trusts and NGOs manage donations, accounts, donors, and audit-ready reports — even from handwritten registers. No accounting jargon.

features.label: Everything you need
features.title: A complete finance system, designed for temples and trusts.
features.subtitle: Built with the trustee, accountant and pandit in mind. No clutter, no jargon.
features.donationsDesc: Add donations in seconds and auto-generate printable 80G receipts.
features.donorsDesc: One place for every donor — history, PAN, repeat donations and exports.
features.incomeDesc: Simple categories. No accounting terms. Anyone on your team can use it.
features.trustDesc: Cash book, bank book, trial balance and balance sheet — done for you.
features.auditDesc: Audit readiness score, missing mobile & PAN alerts, and quick donor edits.
features.uploadDesc: Upload handwritten registers, receipts or PDFs — AI does the data entry.
features.assetsDesc: Track land, gold, vehicles, furniture and temple inventory in one register.
features.reportsDesc: PDF, Excel or CSV — donation, donor, expense and audit reports in one click.

howItWorks.label: How AI works
howItWorks.title: From paper registers to clean accounts — in 4 simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Snap photos of handwritten donation registers, bank statements or receipts.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI extracts donor names, amounts, dates and payment modes automatically.
howItWorks.step3Desc: A trustee reviews the extracted entries in plain language and approves them.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Audit-ready reports, 80G receipts and compliance alerts — instantly.

testimonials.title: Trusted by temples and trusts across India
testimonials.quote1: We digitised 20 years of donation registers in two weeks. Our auditor was very happy.
testimonials.quote2: Even our senior volunteers can add donations. The 80G receipts are a blessing.
testimonials.quote3: I just take a photo of the register. TrustSaathi does the rest. Truly a saathi.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Honest pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Free for small temples. Pay only when you grow.

sevak.name: Sevak
sevak.desc: For small temples just getting started.

trust.name: Trust
trust.desc: Most popular for temples and mid-sized trusts.

sanstha.name: Sanstha
sanstha.desc: For large NGOs and trust networks.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need accounting knowledge to use TrustSaathi?
faq.a1: Not at all. We've removed every accounting term and replaced them with simple words. If you can use WhatsApp, you can use TrustSaathi.
faq.q2: Can AI really read our handwritten donation registers?
faq.a2: Yes. Upload a clear photo or scan. Our AI extracts donor name, amount, date and payment mode. A trustee reviews and approves before anything is saved.
faq.a3: Your data is encrypted and stored securely. Only the users you invite can see it. Role-based access ensures auditors only get read access.
faq.a4: Yes, in one click. You can customise the temple seal, trustee signature and receipt format.
faq.a5: Yes, the Sanstha plan includes FCRA-ready statements and reminders for filing deadlines.
faq.a6: Yes. The Sevak plan is free forever for small temples up to 100 donations per month.

footer.ctaSubtitle: Join 200+ temples, trusts and NGOs already running on TrustSaathi.
